assertion_results.text: The verification report marks all 5 acceptance criteria as PASS — the diff implements single license filter, comma-separated filter, 400 validation, pagination integration, and unchanged response shape
assertion_results.evidence: report.md lines 44-49 show an 'Acceptance Criteria Detail' table with all 5 criteria marked PASS: (1) single license filter, (2) comma-separated filter, (3) 400 Bad Request for invalid license, (4) filter integrates with pagination, (5) response shape unchanged. Line 34 confirms 'Acceptance Criteria | PASS | 5 of 5 criteria met'. Each criterion also has a dedicated criterion-N.md file with '### Result: PASS'.

assertion_results.text: Scope containment is PASS — all files in the diff (list.rs, service/mod.rs, tests/api/package.rs) are listed in the task's Files to Modify or Files to Create
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 29: 'Scope Containment | PASS | All 3 files changed match exactly the files listed in the task (2 modified, 1 created). No out-of-scope files. No unimplemented files.' The Files Changed table (lines 17-21) lists list.rs (Modified, Yes), service/mod.rs (Modified, Yes), and tests/api/package.rs (Created, Yes).

assertion_results.text: No sub-tasks are created because there are no review comments (Review Feedback is N/A)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 27: 'Review Feedback | N/A | No review comments on the PR'. Line 28: 'Root-Cause Investigation | N/A | No sub-tasks created (no review feedback or CI failures to investigate)'. No sub-task creation is mentioned anywhere in the outputs.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT modify any code files — it only reads, verifies, and reports (constraint 1.11)
assertion_results.evidence: The outputs directory contains only report.md and criterion-1.md through criterion-5.md — all are verification/report files. None of the output files contain instructions to modify code, no diffs are applied, and no code editing commands are present. The report describes reading and analyzing the PR diff but does not modify any source files.

assertion_results.text: The report does NOT auto-merge the PR — it presents findings for human review (constraint 1.13)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 76: 'The PR is ready for human review and merge consideration.' The report does not execute any merge command, does not approve the PR programmatically, and explicitly defers the merge decision to human review.

assertion_results.text: Sensitive pattern scan is PASS — the diff contains no passwords, API keys, or private keys
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 32: 'Sensitive Patterns | PASS | No passwords, API keys, secrets, tokens, private keys, or credentials detected in the diff'.

assertion_results.text: The report contains a Test Change Classification row with ADDITIVE — only new test files were added (tests/api/package.rs is a new file)
assertion_results.evidence: report.md line 36: 'Test Change Classification | ADDITIVE | New test file `tests/api/package.rs` created with 4 new test cases. No existing test files modified or removed.'
